00:00:00 Introduction Intro

Summary

The host introduces the episode.

00:00:00 Welcome to the show. I'm your host. Today we're talking about Python packaging.

00:00:10 Python Packaging

Summary

Discussion of modern Python packaging with pyproject.toml.

00:00:10 First, let's discuss pyproject.toml files. They replace setup.py and setup.cfg.

00:00:20 The build backend is usually hatchling.

Key Points

  • pyproject.toml replaces setup.py
  • hatchling is the recommended build backend

00:00:25 Closing Outro

Summary

The host signs off.

00:00:25 Thanks for listening to the show today.
